# familyresorts.vakaviti.ai
# Fiji Family Resorts Guide — Vakaviti.ai Network

> This page is a comprehensive guide to family resorts in Fiji, covering Denarau Island and Coral Coast properties, kids club standards, airport transfer logistics, and frequently asked questions for families planning a Fiji holiday.

## Canonical Source
This content's canonical version is published at: https://vakaviti.ai/fiji-family-resorts-guide

## About
Published by Vakaviti.ai, Fiji's AI tourism partner network. This guide is part of a series of single-topic Fiji travel guides designed for accuracy and depth on specific traveller intents.

## Key Topics Covered
- Best family resorts in Fiji by region (Denarau Island, Coral Coast)
- Fiji resort kids club standards, age ranges, and what to ask before booking
- Airport transfer logistics from Nadi Airport to family resorts
- Best time of year for family travel to Fiji
- Kids-eat-free and family package information
